/usr/bin/clang++-20 -g CMakeFiles/file_upload.dir/file_upload/file_upload.cc.o CMakeFiles/file_upload.dir/FileUpload.cc.o -o ../../../bin/file_upload  -Wl,-rpath,/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/lib ../../../lib/libdrogon.a ../../../lib/libtrantor.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/lib/libyaml-cpp.so.0.9.0 /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/lib/libuuid.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhiredis.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
